ddls:
CREATE TABLE "test_runs" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test run */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the test run occurred */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the vehicle used in the test */,
  "test_condition" TEXT /* Condition under which the test was conducted */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the test run in seconds */,
  "test_location" TEXT /* Location where the test was conducted */,
  "test_temperature" REAL /* Temperature during the test */,
  "test_weather" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the test */,
  "test_notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the test */,
  "test_driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver who conducted the test */,
  "test_vehicle_configuration" TEXT /* Configuration of the vehicle (e.g., tire type, fuel type) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_runs_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_runs_test_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_driver_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle (e.g., Ford, Toyota) */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of manufacture */,
  "engine_type" TEXT /* Type of engine (e.g., gasoline, electric) */,
  "vehicle_vin" TEXT /* Vehicle Identification Number */,
  "vehicle_fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel used */,
  "vehicle_tire_type" TEXT /* Type of tires used */,
  "vehicle_mileage" INTEGER /* Mileage of the vehicle at the time of the test */,
  "vehicle_weight" REAL /* Weight of the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_production_date" TEXT /* Date of vehicle production */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor data record */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated test run */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance traveled during the recording (in meters) */,
  "avg_lat" REAL /* Average latitude of the vehicle during the recording */,
  "avg_lng" REAL /* Average longitude of the vehicle during the recording */,
  "gps_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the GPS reading (in meters) */,
  "avg_speed_by_gps" REAL /* Average speed recorded by GPS (in m/s) */,
  "accelerator_std" REAL /* Standard deviation of the accelerator data */,
  "max_accelerator" REAL /* Maximum accelerator value recorded */,
  "min_accelerator" REAL /* Minimum accelerator value recorded */,
  "percentile_25_accelerator" REAL /* 25th percentile of accelerator values */,
  "percentile_75_accelerator" REAL /* 75th percentile of accelerator values */,
  "accelerator_entropy" REAL /* Entropy of the accelerator data */,
  "avg_roll" REAL /* Average roll angle of the vehicle (in degrees) */,
  "avg_yaw" REAL /* Average yaw angle of the vehicle (in degrees) */,
  "avg_pitch" REAL /* Average pitch angle of the vehicle (in degrees) */,
  "week_day" INTEGER /* Day of the week when the test was conducted */,
  "label1" INTEGER /* Custom label 1 for categorizing data */,
  "label2" TEXT /* Custom label 2 for categorizing data */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g., GPS, accelerometer, gyroscope) */,
  "sensor_position" INTEGER /* Position of the sensor on the vehicle (e.g., front, rear) */,
  "sensor_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the sensor */,
  "sensor_firmware_version" TEXT /* Firmware version of the sensor */,
  "sensor_status" TEXT /* Status of the sensor during the test (e.g., active, malfunctioning) */,
  "sensor_calibration_date" REAL /* Date of the last sensor calibration */,
  "min_speed_by_gps" REAL /* Minimum speed recorded by GPS */,
  "max_speed_by_gps" REAL /* Maximum speed recorded by GPS */,
  "avg_brake_pressure" REAL /* Average brake pressure */,
  "max_brake_pressure" REAL /* Maximum brake pressure */,
  "min_brake_pressure" REAL /* Minimum brake pressure */,
  "percentile_25_brake_pressure" REAL /* 25th percentile of brake pressure values */,
  "percentile_75_brake_pressure" REAL /* 75th percentile of brake pressure values */,
  "brake_pressure_entropy" REAL /* Entropy of the brake pressure data */,
  "avg_steering_angle" REAL /* Average steering angle */,
  "max_steering_angle" REAL /* Maximum steering angle */,
  "min_steering_angle" REAL /* Minimum steering angle */,
  "percentile_25_steering_angle" REAL /* 25th percentile of steering angle values */,
  "percentile_75_steering_angle" REAL /* 75th percentile of steering angle values */,
  "steering_angle_entropy" REAL /* Entropy of the steering angle data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES test_runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, analyst, admin) */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "user_supervisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's supervisor */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "user_access_level" INTEGER /* Access level of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_user_supervisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_supervisor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the data */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test run associated with the accessed data */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the data was accessed */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used to access the data */,
  "access_duration" REAL /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES test_runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the test condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test condition */,
  "condition_type" TEXT /* Type of test condition */,
  "condition_environment" TEXT /* Environment in which the test is conducted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated test run */,
  "avg_speed" REAL /* Average speed during the test run */,
  "max_speed" REAL /* Maximum speed achieved during the test run */,
  "avg_acceleration" REAL /* Average acceleration during the test run */,
  "avg_brake_pressure" REAL /* Average brake pressure during the test run */,
  "max_brake_pressure" REAL /* Maximum brake pressure during the test run */,
  "avg_steering_angle" REAL /* Average steering angle during the test run */,
  "max_steering_angle" REAL /* Maximum steering angle during the test run */,
  "min_steering_angle" REAL /* Minimum steering angle during the test run */,
  "avg_roll" REAL /* Average roll angle during the test run */,
  "avg_yaw" REAL /* Average yaw angle during the test run */,
  "avg_pitch" REAL /* Average pitch angle during the test run */,
  "anomaly_detected" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if any anomalies were detected during the test run */,
  "anomaly_description" TEXT /* Description of the detected anomalies */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES test_runs ("run_id")
)
